name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes Overview
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Welcome to "},{"text":"Marketing Cloud","bold":true},{"text":" Release Notes!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This portion of the knowledge base contains information regarding all historical releases for this platform."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Explore the sections below to find the release notes for the year:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2376-2026-releases-overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"2026 Releases Overview"}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2270-2025-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2025 Releases Overview"}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2271-2024-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2024 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2272-2023-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2023 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2273-2022-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2022 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2274-2021-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2021 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2275-2020-and-2019-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2020 and 2019 Releases Overview"}]},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
